prompt: Write a four-chord pop progression (I-V-vi-IV) in G major.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly identified the I-V-vi-IV chords in G major (G, D, Em, C) and attempted to sequence them.
judgment.quality_reason: The BIRD syntax is fundamentally flawed; stacking 'n' lines with full chords creates dissonant clusters instead of a progression, and stacking 'p' lines in the bass is invalid.
